items.title: The New York Liberty have won their fourth-straight game, rallying from a 12-point deficit in the third quarter to take a 83-75 victory over the Indiana Fever
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
The New York Liberty have won their fourth-straight game, rallying from a 12-point deficit in the third quarter to take a 83-75 victory over the Indiana Fever

It's the largest comeback win for the Liberty this season, as well as the second-largest blown lead for the  Fever

items.title: A 29-18 fourth quarter in favor of the Liberty dooms the Fever. New York took 23 fouls shots in that quarter and made 21. Poor finish for the Fever and they fall to 5-5. Final score: 83-75.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: A 29-18 fourth quarter in favor of the Liberty dooms the Fever. New York took 23 fouls shots in that quarter and made 21. Poor finish for the Fever and they fall to 5-5. Final score: 83-75.

items.title: Fever led most of the game and it was tied at 68 with 3:50 left. Then, Fever faded and were outscored 15-7 the rest of the way in 83-75 loss.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever led most of the game and it was tied at 68 with 3:50 left. Then, Fever faded and were outscored 15-7 the rest of the way in 83-75 loss.

NY was +24 on FTs. Stewart had 30/8, Mitchell scored 21.

Next: Mon. at WAS

items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Stewart gets Clark on the mismatch and attacks, drawing Clark's fifth foul with 6:26 left. The only Fever player in foul trouble.

She's replaced by Johnson.

Three-point lead.

items.title: Aliyah Boston has moved into third place in franchise history for rebounds with 1,117 — passing Ebony Hoffman — in 133 games.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Aliyah Boston has moved into third place in franchise history for rebounds with 1,117 — passing Ebony Hoffman — in 133 games.

She's 73 away from Erlana Larkins (2nd). Tamika Catchings is the record holder: 3,315.
